title: Blue economy sees a surge in investment and growing investor interest
content: Favourable winds for the blue economy: investment is gaining momentum, dedicated funds are on the rise, and more investors are turning their attention to ocean-related opportunities.
snippet: Favourable winds for the blue economy: investment is gaining momentum, dedicated funds are on the rise, and more investors are turning their attention to ocean-related opportunities.

title: Statement by President von der Leyen on the impact of the situation in the Middle East on the European Union
content: We had an orientation debate, mostly on the economic impact of the crisis in the Middle East on the European Union. As we all know, for 44 days now, once again the Middle East has been engulfed in war.
snippet: We had an orientation debate, mostly on the economic impact of the crisis in the Middle East on the European Union. As we all know, for 44 days now, once again the Middle East has been engulfed in war

title: EU agri-food trade posts EUR 3.2 billion surplus in January
content: The latest monthly agri-food trade report shows developments in imports and exports of EU agri-food products in January 2026.
snippet: The latest monthly agri-food trade report shows developments in imports and exports of EU agri-food products in January 2026.

title: Commission launches platform to aggregate demand of raw materials and boost diversification
content: Today, the European Commission launches the first call to gather buyers and suppliers under the Raw Materials Mechanism.
snippet: Today, the European Commission launches the first call to gather buyers and suppliers under the Raw Materials Mechanism.

title: Commission launches platform to aggregate demand of raw materials and boost diversification
content: On 13 April, the European Commission launched the first call to gather buyers and suppliers under the Raw Materials Mechanism. Through this platform, buyers of critical raw materials will be able to aggregate demand and connect with suppliers, financial institutions, and storage providers.

title: Energy Union Task Force calls for enhanced EU-wide coordination to safeguard energy security
content: Discussion of the EU’s energy security situation in the wake of developments in the Middle East at today’s meeting of the Energy Union Task Force Security  confirmed that there is no immediate risk to the EU’s security of oil and gas supply.
snippet: Discussion of the EU’s energy security situation in the wake of developments in the Middle East at today’s meeting of the Energy Union Task Force Security confirmed that there is no immediate risk to

title: EU Emissions Trading System sustains downward trend in covered emissions
content: EU ETS emissions fell 1.3% in 2025, continuing a long-term decline that has halved emissions since 2005. Power sector shifts, led by strong solar growth, and falling industrial emissions keep the EU on track for its 2030 target of a 62% reduction.
snippet: EU ETS emissions fell 1.3% in 2025, continuing a long-term decline that has halved emissions since 2005. Power sector shifts, led by strong solar growth, and falling industrial emissions keep the EU o

title: Content professional finds dream job in Munich
content: Patience and perseverance paid off for Italian content specialist Giorgia Cappellina when she sought the support of EURES to realise her ambition of moving to work in Germany.
snippet: Patience and perseverance paid off for Italian content specialist Giorgia Cappellina when she sought the support of EURES to realise her ambition of moving to work in Germany.

title: Evaluation of the EU Agency for the Coordination of Energy Regulators
content: The European Commission has published a 4-week call for evidence to gather input for its evaluation of the EU Agency for the Cooperation of Energy Regulators (ACER).
snippet: The European Commission has published a 4-week call for evidence to gather input for its evaluation of the EU Agency for the Cooperation of Energy Regulators (ACER).

title: A more secure, efficient and convenient way of travelling for non-EU nationals
content: The automated Entry/Exit System for non-EU nationals travelling for short stays becomes fully operational
snippet: The automated Entry/Exit System for non-EU nationals travelling for short stays becomes fully operational

title: Gas Coordination Group confirms EU preparedness for the upcoming summer season
content: In a meeting of the Gas Coordination Group held this morning, the Commission, EU countries and industry representatives discussed the security of gas supply in the EU as the disruptions in the Middle East enter their sixth week.
snippet: In a meeting of the Gas Coordination Group held this morning, the Commission, EU countries and industry representatives discussed the security of gas supply in the EU as the disruptions in the Middle

title: Pact for the Mediterranean delivers as EU unveils first digital initiative for the region
content: As part of the ongoing strengthened engagement with the Southern Mediterranean partners, the European Commission has launched a digital transformation programme covering North Africa and the Middle East countries.
snippet: As part of the ongoing strengthened engagement with the Southern Mediterranean partners, the European Commission has launched a digital transformation programme covering North Africa and the Middle Ea

title: New rules for measuring electric vehicle charging and hydrogen refilling stations in the EU enter into force today
content: The amended Measuring Instruments Directive is today entering into force, ensuring accurate and reliable measurements for electric vehicle charging and hydrogen refilling stations.
snippet: The amended Measuring Instruments Directive is today entering into force, ensuring accurate and reliable measurements for electric vehicle charging and hydrogen refilling stations.

title: 235 key cross-border energy projects to boost Europe’s interconnectivity
content: The second list of Projects of Common Interest (PCIs) and Projects of Mutual Interest (PMIs) has been published in the Official Journal of the European Union today.
snippet: The second list of Projects of Common Interest (PCIs) and Projects of Mutual Interest (PMIs) has been published in the Official Journal of the European Union today.

title: New energy market integrity and transparency rules
content: Today, two important sets of rules aimed at making energy markets more transparent and fairer have been published in the Official Journal of the European Union.
snippet: Today, two important sets of rules aimed at making energy markets more transparent and fairer have been published in the Official Journal of the European Union.

title: Commission, EU countries and industry meet to assess the oil market situation
content: In the ad hoc meeting of the Oil Coordination Group held today, representatives from the European Commission, EU countries and industry provided updated information on the EU’s oil security of supply situation, as the disruptions in the Middle East enter their sixth week.
snippet: In the ad hoc meeting of the Oil Coordination Group held today, representatives from the European Commission, EU countries and industry provided updated information on the EU’s oil security of supply

title: Statement by PR Macron, PM Meloni, CNC Merz, PM Starmer, PM Carney, PM Frederiksen, PM Jetten, PM Sanchez, PR von der Leyen, PR Costa
content: We welcome the two-week ceasefire concluded between the United States and Iran today.
snippet: We welcome the two-week ceasefire concluded between the United States and Iran today.

title: Aviation Inclusion Event to mark IDAHOBIT, 18 May 2026
content: Join the Aviation Inclusion Event to mark IDAHOBIT on 18 May 2026  at 10:00 CEST!
snippet: Join the Aviation Inclusion Event to mark IDAHOBIT on 18 May 2026 at 10:00 CEST!

title: Applications open for 2027 European Capitals of Tourism award
content: Tourism destinations across Europe are invited to present their most innovative and sustainable tourism initiatives, positioning themselves as leading examples in the field.
snippet: Tourism destinations across Europe are invited to present their most innovative and sustainable tourism initiatives, positioning themselves as leading examples in the field.

title: Joint press release by the Commission and the Kingdom of Morocco on the launch of a Digital Dialogue to strengthen strategic cooperation
content: Today, the EU and the Kingdom of Morocco strengthened their relationship as strategic partners in the digital field by launching the EU-Morocco Digital Dialogue.
snippet: Today, the EU and the Kingdom of Morocco strengthened their relationship as strategic partners in the digital field by launching the EU-Morocco Digital Dialogue.

title: First CBAM certificate price is now available
content: The European Commission has published the first price of CBAM certificates for 2026 Q1 on its new dedicated page on the CBAM website, marking an important milestone in the implementation of CBAM.
snippet: The European Commission has published the first price of CBAM certificates for 2026 Q1 on its new dedicated page on the CBAM website, marking an important milestone in the implementation of CBAM.

title: 2nd Horizon Europe association Joint Committee meeting between Canada and the European Union
content: The second EU-Canada Joint Committee Meeting took place in Brussels on 26 March 2026, to take stock of the implementation of the agreement associating Canada to Pillar II of Horizon Europe.
snippet: The second EU-Canada Joint Committee Meeting took place in Brussels on 26 March 2026, to take stock of the implementation of the agreement associating Canada to Pillar II of Horizon Europe.

title: Trends in PES: Insights from the 2025 Capacity Report
content: The European Network of Public Employment Services (PES Network) has just published its latest ‘Assessment report on PES capacity.’ The report provides an overview of the services Public Employment Services offer, latest trends and challenges they are facing.
snippet: The European Network of Public Employment Services (PES Network) has just published its latest ‘Assessment report on PES capacity.’ The report provides an overview of the services Public Employment Se

title: The European Commission moves to strengthen EUSPA’s support in the implementation of the EU's space ambitions
content: Today, the European Commission unveiled a proposal establishing a standalone founding act for the European Union Space Services Agency (EUSPA), thereby renaming the current Agency for the European Space Programme and amending the existing Union Space Programme Regulation (EU) 2021/696.

title: Commission calls for organisations to join Zero Pollution Stakeholder Platform
content: Applications for the renewed Zero Pollution Stakeholder Platform must be completed by 5 May.
snippet: Applications for the renewed Zero Pollution Stakeholder Platform must be completed by 5 May.

title: Commission takes preparatory steps on financial support for Ukraine and boosting drone production
content: On 1st April 2026, the European Commission took preparatory steps for the implementation of the €90 billion Ukraine Support Loan, aimed at securing necessary budgetary support and accelerating urgent defence procurement for Ukraine in 2026 and 2027.
snippet: On 1st April 2026, the European Commission took preparatory steps for the implementation of the €90 billion Ukraine Support Loan, aimed at securing necessary budgetary support and accelerating urgent

title: LIFE Calls for proposals published on 21 April
content: The LIFE Calls for proposals 2026 will be published on the EU Funding & Tenders Portal on 21 April.
snippet: The LIFE Calls for proposals 2026 will be published on the EU Funding & Tenders Portal on 21 April.

title: Urban green spaces are scarce, while climate and wealth impact access
content: A study of 862 European cities reveals a lack of adequate access to green space. It also highlights a climate-driven geographical difference and a clear socioeconomic divide.
snippet: A study of 862 European cities reveals a lack of adequate access to green space. It also highlights a climate-driven geographical difference and a clear socioeconomic divide.

title: Fourth EU-Albania Horizon Europe Joint Research and Innovation Committee meeting
content: The meeting focused on key policy developments and the successful participation of Albania in Horizon Europe.
snippet: The meeting focused on key policy developments and the successful participation of Albania in Horizon Europe.

title: Europe’s Coal Regions in Transition shape the future of clean energy
content: Building on nearly a decade of experience in helping coal dependent communities move toward a climate neutral future, the European Commission’s Coal Regions in Transition (CRiT) initiative continues to support impacted regions.
snippet: Building on nearly a decade of experience in helping coal dependent communities move toward a climate neutral future, the European Commission’s Coal Regions in Transition (CRiT) initiative continues t

title: VIDEO: What is the value of a tree?
content: As we face increasing environmental challenges, understanding the value of a tree is crucial, but what is a tree actually worth?
snippet: As we face increasing environmental challenges, understanding the value of a tree is crucial, but what is a tree actually worth?

title: EQAVET peer review on the Quality Management System for the Education Authority in Austria
content: The EQAVET peer review provided an opportunity for Austria to receive an external, European perspective on the development of a new Quality Management System for the Education Authority, aligned with the national Quality Management System for Schools

title: Radioactive Waste Directive and Shipments Directive: Consultations on evaluating current rules
content: The European Commission has launched a 12-week open public consultation and a 4-week call for evidence to help shape EU radioactive waste and spent fuel policy for the decade ahead.
snippet: The European Commission has launched a 12-week open public consultation and a 4-week call for evidence to help shape EU radioactive waste and spent fuel policy for the decade ahead.

title: Entry/Exit System (EES) is fully operational
content: 10 April 2026 marks a significant milestone in European border security as the Entry/Exit System (EES) becomes fully operational across all Schengen countries. Passport stamps are being replaced with digital records of entries and exits of non-EU nationals coming for short stays.
snippet: 10 April 2026 marks a significant milestone in European border security as the Entry/Exit System (EES) becomes fully operational across all Schengen countries. Passport stamps are being replaced with

title: WIN-BIG Women Ocean Champions - Bringing Stories Together in One Place
content: WIN BIG Women Ocean Champions brings these stories together in one place. The book features 100 portraits and first-person stories from women working across Europe’s Blue Economy, representing different sectors, career stages and sea basins.

title: Launch of European Ocean Board
content: The European Commission has officially launched the European Ocean Board, a high-level expert group supporting the implementation of the European Ocean Pact.
snippet: The European Commission has officially launched the European Ocean Board, a high-level expert group supporting the implementation of the European Ocean Pact.

title: Statement by Executive Vice-President Mînzatu, Commissioners Lahbib and Kos ahead of International Roma Day
content: Romani heritage, language and art are integral parts of our continent's history and cultural richness. Ahead of International Roma Day, we celebrate the long-standing presence of Roma people in Europe and their key contribution to our societies.
